# ONE Box - Full Documentation

> Mystery Experience Platform. Part of the ONE ecosystem.

## Table of Contents

1. Overview
2. Core Philosophy
3. EXPL Nodes
4. Features & Functionality
5. Revenue Model
6. Ecosystem Products
7. Technical Architecture
8. Frequently Asked Questions
9. Links & Community
10. Contact

---

## 1. Overview

ONE Box is a mystery experience platform within the ONE ecosystem. Something mysterious is coming soon to the ecosystem. The platform represents an upcoming addition to the interconnected suite of ONE products, each serving a unique purpose within the decentralized infrastructure.

Stay tuned for the mystery reveal. ONE Box will join the growing family of open-source, community-driven applications powered by EXPL Nodes.

---

## 2. Core Philosophy

### Open Source
Every line of code is publicly available on GitHub. We believe in transparency, community contribution, and collaborative development. Anyone can review, fork, and contribute to the platform.

### Community-Driven
Built by people who love what they create. Every feature, every decision, every improvement comes from listening to our community. We're not building for users; we're building WITH users.

### Fair Revenue Model
Unlike traditional Web3 projects where founders take the majority:
- **45% to EXPL Node Owners**: Distributed proportionally to all Node holders
- **45% to ONE Creators**: Rewarding contributors, builders, and participants
- **10% to Founders**: Team operational and development costs

This ensures the community always benefits first.

---

## 3. EXPL Nodes

### What are EXPL Nodes?

EXPL Nodes are the foundational ownership units of the entire ONE ecosystem. Owning a Node is like owning shares in a company, but better — you earn daily tokens AND receive revenue share from ALL ecosystem products.

### Node Benefits

Each EXPL Node provides:
- **Shareholder Status**: Across ALL ecosystem projects (Pump, Network, World, Box, etc.)
- **Daily Token Emissions**: 171 EXPL tokens per day for 731 days = 125,000 EXPL total
- **Revenue Share**: 45% of ALL ecosystem revenue distributed to Node owners proportionally
- **Governance Rights**: Vote on ecosystem decisions and future direction
- **Exclusive Access**: Early access to new products and features

### Supply & Distribution

- **Total Supply**: 1 million Nodes
- **Batch 1**: 12,000 Nodes (already distributed)
- **Batch 2**: 88,000 Nodes
- **Batch 3**: 900,000 Nodes

Scarcity ensures value. As the ecosystem grows, Node ownership becomes increasingly valuable.

---

## 4. Features & Functionality

### Coming Soon

ONE Box features will be revealed when the mystery is unveiled. Stay tuned for announcements on our official channels.

---

## 5. Revenue Model

### How Revenue is Generated

- Platform transaction fees
- Premium features (future)
- Marketplace commissions
- Ecosystem service fees

### How Revenue is Distributed

Every dollar of revenue follows this split:
- **45% to EXPL Node Owners**: Distributed proportionally based on Node holdings
- **45% to ONE Creators**: Community contributors, builders, participants
- **10% to Founders**: Operational costs, development, team salaries

This model ensures:
- Community benefits FIRST
- Sustainable development
- Long-term alignment
- Fair value distribution

---

## 6. Ecosystem Products

### Active Products

| Product | Domain | Description |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| **ONE Pump** | pump.expl.one | Crypto sentiment tracking |
| **ONE Network** | network.expl.one | Decentralized node management platform |
| **ONE World** | world.expl.one | Metaverse game lobby and multiplayer interface |
| **EXPL Nodes** | node.expl.one | Node purchase and management portal |
| **ONE Docs** | docs.expl.one | Complete ecosystem documentation |

### Coming Soon

| Product | Domain | Description |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| **ONE Box** | box.expl.one | Mystery experience platform (this product) |
| **ONE ID** | id.expl.one | Decentralized digital identity |
| **ONE Agent** | agent.expl.one | AI-powered blockchain agents |
| **ONE Chat** | chat.expl.one | Encrypted messaging platform |
| **ONE Venture** | venture.expl.one | Community investment platform |
| **ONE Care** | care.expl.one | Charitable giving platform |
| **ONE Merch** | merch.expl.one | Ecosystem merchandise store |
| **ONE Space** | space.expl.one | Extended metaverse experiences |

### Ecosystem Strategy

Each product operates independently but benefits the entire ecosystem:
- Revenue from ALL products distributed to Node owners
- Cross-platform user accounts via ONE ID
- Unified EXPL token across all platforms
- Shared community governance

---

## 7. Technical Architecture

### Frontend Stack

- **Framework**: React 19 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Runtime**: Bun for blazing-fast package management and execution
- **Build Tool**: Vite for lightning-fast development and builds
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with JIT compilation
- **Icons**: Phosphor Icons for consistent iconography
- **Animations**: Framer Motion for smooth interactions

### Build & Deployment

- **SSG Pre-rendering**: Puppeteer-based static site generation
  - Crawlers see full rendered HTML
  - Instant content visibility for search engines and AI systems
  - Faster initial page load for users
- **Deployment**: AWS S3 + CloudFront with automatic CI/CD
- **CDN**: CloudFront global distribution
- **Domain**: box.expl.one

### SEO & AI Visibility

- **Meta Tags**: Complete Open Graph and Twitter Card implementation
- **Structured Data**: Organization, WebSite, WebApplication, BreadcrumbList schemas
- **LLMs.txt**: AI-readable documentation standard
- **AI Crawlers**: 15+ AI systems allowed (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, etc.)
- **Sitemap**: XML sitemap for search engine indexing

---

## 8. Frequently Asked Questions

### What is ONE Box?

ONE Box is a mystery experience platform within the ONE ecosystem. The full details will be revealed soon.

### When will ONE Box launch?

Stay tuned for announcements on our official channels. Follow us on Twitter/X and join our Discord for the latest updates.

### What are EXPL Nodes?

EXPL Nodes are ownership units in the ONE ecosystem. Each Node:
- Earns 171 EXPL tokens daily for 731 days
- Receives 45% of ALL ecosystem revenue
- Grants governance rights
- Provides shareholder status across all products

Learn more: https://node.expl.one

### Is ONE Box open source?

Yes! Every line of code is public on GitHub: https://github.com/explorills

We believe in transparency and community contribution.

### How does the revenue model work?

All ecosystem revenue is split:
- 45% to Node owners (distributed proportionally)
- 45% to Creators (community contributors)
- 10% to Founders (operations and development)
